title: selaginella scabrifolia
intro: Selaginella scabrifolia, also known as the rough-leaved spike moss, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Selaginellaceae family. It is native to tropical regions and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Selaginella scabrifolia include its potential to reduce fever, treat respiratory issues, and alleviate skin conditions. Selaginella scabrifolia can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or dried extracts, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
